[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111100 6
1 0001110000 3
2 1001010001 4
3 1101010111 7
4 0111111101 8
5 0001111110 6
6 1001111011 7
7 1110111110 8
